title: Vision & Goals
vision: To build practical technology products that combine strong software foundations with real-world hardware capability. I want to create systems that are useful, reliable, and grounded in actual user needs rather than unnecessary complexity.

shortTerm: Strengthen full stack engineering through better system design, architecture, and execution discipline.
Build stronger embedded fundamentals with ESP8266/ESP32, sensors, and communication protocols.
Improve confidence in Embedded C/C++ and debugging at the device level.
Create more focused projects that connect software interfaces with physical systems.
longTerm: Become an engineer capable of building complete software plus hardware solutions.
Develop products that solve practical problems in education, operations, or everyday life.
Build depth in architecture, product thinking, and long-term system maintainability.
Create technology that remains accessible, affordable, and useful in real environments.

values: Understanding real problems before building solutions
